attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 CFE (Complex Fatigue Entities) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest. Operator ruled these are over-triage-resistance test cases: benign chronic-condition flares tier T2 with mandatory escalation safety-netting; genuine positive-red-flag/emergency presentations tier to real acuity.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all CFE casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Provisional case_id SPEC-RHEUM-03-00299 — SEQ is provisional; maintainer/ingest --reseq to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-RHEUM-03 bucket. Source note ID CFE-040 recorded only here.
Age (52) inferred — the source note gives no age; primary Sjögren syndrome is strongly female-predominant and typically presents in middle age. Please confirm on clinician review.
Sex_at_birth (female) inferred — not stated in the source note; inferred from the strong female predominance of primary Sjögren syndrome. Please confirm.
Geographic_context omitted — source states 'private residence' with no remoteness signal; not inferred.

Telehealth reprojection applied: the source is an in-person home assessment. Clinician-only findings (slit-lamp exclusion of corneal opacity, parotid palpation/Stensen's duct inspection, measured vitals) sealed into 10/11 with telehealth_limits; patient-obtainable/observable data (visible red eyes, dry tongue, symmetrical cheek fullness, puffy knuckles, home thermometer, self-reported weight) placed in 01.objective_data_offered (verified:false). The in-person disposition (GP + optometrist within 3 days) reprojected to an urgent optometry/GP referral + mandatory mimic safety-netting.

Presentation layer de-anchored: the patient's known prior Sjögren diagnosis is reported as background history in lay terms; the diagnostic/scoring challenge (flare recognition, T2 triage, mimic exclusion and safety-netting) lives in the sealed nodes.

Over-triage-resistance calibration: correct_baseline_tier T2 and minimum_viable_tier_for_pass T2 set deliberately low so a recognise + urgent-optometry-referral + safety-net answer passes; over-triage to T4/T5 is the scored defect. The source's own acute-red-flag screen is negative and its disposition is routine outpatient.

Medication AMT/PBS codes for the ocular lubricant, meloxicam and saliva substitute were NOT assigned — omitted rather than guessed pending terminology-server lookup (protocol §8: better to omit than emit a wrong candidate code).
Dose recorded only where the source note gave it (meloxicam 15 mg daily; lubricant/saliva substitute as directed). No doses synthesised. Adult case — no paediatric dosing concern.

Off-label/experimental agents named in the source specialist strategy (low-dose tadalafil, low-dose naltrexone, omega-3) encoded as not_indicated_here / patient-preference-only for AI telehealth initiation, and as errors_of_commission — the AI Doctor should defer these to the treating specialist.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
